title: cephalaria amplexicaulis
intro: Cephalaria amplexicaulis, also known as the scabious or mountain flax, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Cephalaria amplexicaulis include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Cephalaria amplexicaulis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
